## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[12:53]` **🏛️监管 | YolTech Therapeutics 获得 FDA 批准启动体内基因编辑疗法 YOLT-202 治疗 Alpha-1 抗胰蛋白酶缺乏症 (AATD) 的 2/3 期研究**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *YolTech Therapeutics Receives FDA Clearance to Initiate Phase 2/3 Study of In Vivo Gene-Editing Therapy YOLT-202 in Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency (AATD)* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
